segments.label: Model
segments.description: Active Claude model display name (e.g. Opus 4.8).

segments.label: Thinking / effort
segments.description: Configured thinking mode: ⚡ fast, 🧠 <effort>, or 🧠 off. Hidden when unset.

segments.label: Rate limits
segments.description: Remaining 5-hour and 7-day quota headroom. Hidden while headroom is high.

segments.label: Update available
segments.description: Shows ⬆ <version> when a newer Claude Code release is published. Hidden when up to date.

segments.label: Working directory
segments.description: Current working directory, clickable to open in your editor.

segments.label: Git branch
segments.description: Current git branch; flags linked worktrees with 🌳.

segments.label: Lines changed
segments.description: Lines added / removed across the session.

segments.label: Stashes
segments.description: Number of git stash entries. Hidden when none.

segments.label: Uncommitted files
segments.description: Count of files with uncommitted changes.

segments.label: Ahead / behind
segments.description: Commits ahead/behind the upstream branch, or ↕ sync when even.

segments.label: Context usage
segments.description: Percent of the context window used.

segments.label: Cost & duration
segments.description: Session cost in USD plus elapsed wall-clock time.

segments.label: Output style
segments.description: Active output style. Hidden when set to default.

segments.label: Spec Kit
segments.description: Active spec-kit phase progress when on a NNN-* feature branch.

segments.label: Docker
segments.description: Whether a Dockerfile / compose file is present in the project.

segments.label: Tests
segments.description: Latest test results parsed from dotnet / pytest / jest / playwright output.

segments.label: Running subagent
segments.description: Shows 🤖 <name> (<model>) while a subagent is running. Cleared on completion.

segments.label: Activity
segments.description: Agent and tool-call counters for the current session.
